response.justification: Maria has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, along with deep expertise in scalable architectures and diverse tech stacks. However, her current role and recent experience are heavily focused on AI-agent infrastructure and geospatial platforms, which may not align closely with the renewable energy/construction technology domain. Additionally, her lack of recent experience with PostgreSQL and Kubernetes (despite prior exposure) could require some ramp-up time.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack development expertise across multiple industries
Proven ability to build scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Experience with modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL or energy/construction tech domains
Recent work heavily focused on AI/ML (LLM integration) rather than traditional full-stack development
May lack familiarity with the specific tooling (e.g., Terraform, AWS RDS) mentioned in the job description

key_factors.factor: Recent focus on AI/ML over traditional full-stack development
